subcategories.name: Uncategorized
subcategories.notes: No dedicated /core/uncategorized page (404). Triggers appear directly under core/ path. Includes Streamer.bot Started, Test, and Timed Actions.

subcategories.name: WebSocket Client
subcategories.notes: Sub-subcategory of WebSocket. Upstream path is core/websocket/client (3 levels deep).

subcategories.name: WebSocket Custom Server
subcategories.notes: Sub-subcategory of WebSocket. Upstream path is core/websocket/custom-server (3 levels deep).

subcategories.name: HypeRate.io

subcategories.name: Pally.gg

subcategories.name: Streamer.bot
